details.redacted_summary: - 00:03 cron：按原文向飞书群 chat:oc_8a7339d738dfbe70306fcd643041c1f3 发送了私有化模型安全提醒与 qwen3_6 切换通知。

triage.rationale: The summary describes a routine agent/cron notification to a team chat, with the Feishu chat identifier already redacted and no visible raw personal data, secrets, or private content values.
suggested_redactions: Redact any underlying source references, database paths, or hashes if exposed outside the review system
Redact detailed internal security-notification content if it contains sensitive operational information
triage.release_summary: A scheduled notification job sent a team chat reminder about private model security practices and an upcoming model routing change. The channel identifier and source details were redacted, and the event is suitable for reuse as a generic operational notification pattern.
triage.reusable_lesson: When summarizing automated team notifications, keep only the notification purpose and delivery outcome while redacting channel IDs, source references, and sensitive operational details.
